name: pwpush-mcp
title: Password Pusher MCP Server
description: MCP server for Password Pusher: create and manage self-destructing secret links. Never retrieves a payload (that consumes a view).

tools.name: create_push
tools.description: Create a Password Pusher secret link and return its sharing URL. The secret payload is NOT echoed back. Share the returned `html_url` with the recipient. A token is sent if PWPUSH_API_TOKEN is set; some instances also allow anonymous push creation. Pass `file_paths` to attach one or more local files (a file push). For a text/url/qr push, set `payload` and `kind`.

arguments.name: payload
arguments.desc: The secret to push (text, a URL, or QR content). Optional when file_paths are given.

arguments.name: kind
arguments.desc: Push type: 'text', 'url', or 'qr'. Ignored when file_paths are given (forced to 'file').

arguments.name: file_paths
arguments.desc: Local file path(s) to attach as a file push (multipart upload).

arguments.name: duration
arguments.desc: Time before the push expires. Accepts a label (15m, 30m, 45m, 1h, 6h, 12h, 1d, 2d, 3d, 4d, 5d, 6d, 1w, 2w, 3w, 1mo, 2mo, 3mo) or the raw enum index 0..17.

arguments.name: passphrase
arguments.desc: Optional passphrase required to view the secret.

arguments.name: note
arguments.desc: Optional private note, visible only to the creator.

arguments.name: deletable_by_viewer
arguments.desc: Allow the recipient to delete the push.

arguments.name: retrieval_step
arguments.desc: Require an extra click before the secret is revealed.

tools.name: preview_push
tools.description: Return the shareable secret URL for a push WITHOUT consuming a view.

arguments.name: url_token
arguments.desc: The url_token of an existing push.

tools.name: expire_push
tools.description: Permanently expire (delete) a push. IRREVERSIBLE. This destroys the payload and any attached files for good. Requires PWPUSH_API_TOKEN (or a push created with deletable_by_viewer).

arguments.name: url_token
arguments.desc: The url_token of the push to expire.

tools.name: get_push_audit
tools.description: Return the audit log (views, IPs, user agents) for a push. Requires auth.

tools.name: list_active_pushes
tools.description: List the authenticated account's active (not yet expired) pushes.

tools.name: list_expired_pushes
tools.description: List the authenticated account's expired pushes.

tools.name: get_version
tools.description: Return the target instance's version and enabled feature flags (no auth).
